properties.name: Summit Restoration & Reconstruction
properties.ae_notes: Met Marcus at RIA Annual in Nashville. Full-service shop doing both mitigation and reconstruction. Currently on Xactimate desktop — estimators are complaining about supplement turnaround and they had a bad audit last quarter because of inconsistent scope documentation. Marcus mentioned they are losing about 8-10% of estimate value on supplements that insurers push back on. Seems open to change but will need ROI proof.
